name: image_generate
description: Generate images from text prompts, optionally with reference images. Uses provider fallback order from config unless a single provider is supplied.

cli.description: Optional CLI-form command line. Example: --prompt "studio product photo" --negative-prompt blur --reference ref.png --width 1536 --height 1024 --output-dir media/image

prompt.description: Positive prompt. Required unless supplied in cli.

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt or things to avoid.

references.description: Local paths, data URLs, or public URLs used as image references.

reference.description: Single reference image path or URL.

output_dir.description: Workspace-relative or absolute output directory. Defaults to media/image.

size.description: WIDTHxHEIGHT or auto. Width/height override this when both are supplied.

aspect_ratio.description: Common aspect ratio such as 1:1, 16:9, or 9:16.

provider.description: Force one provider instead of fallback.

dry_run.description: Return normalized provider payloads without calling APIs.
